page_content:
Prerequisite: JOUR620; and permission of JOUR-Philip Merrill College of Journalism.

Restriction: Must not have completed JOUR462.

JOUR763 Seminar in Newsroom Management (3 Credits) Organization, operation, and administration of the departments of a newsroom: advertising, business-finance, circulation, news-editorial, personnel, production and promotion.

Credit Only Granted for. JOUR481, JOUR675, or JOUR763.
